benchmark_axes.coverage: Discover strong-path logs plus weak-path candidates, never silently dropping unknown sources.
benchmark_axes.truth: Produce evidence-backed facts and carry scan transparency through publish.
benchmark_axes.delight: Generate an annual-review style builder recap with a distinct identity, signature build, and shareable taste signals.

evals.prompt: 帮我生成一个 BuilderBio，把我本地所有 AI coding agent 的使用痕迹都扫出来并发布，不要漏。
evals.expected_output: Runs a full-history BuilderBio scan, emits an audit report, verifies coverage, builds evidence-backed D/E, and publishes a live BuilderBio page.
assertions: Runs parse_sessions.py with --days 0 for a full-history scan
Scans all known local agent roots instead of stopping at a single agent
Performs weak discovery and surfaces unsupported candidates in the audit rather than silently skipping them
Carries scanner_version into D.profile and scan_audit into E.scan_audit before publish
Shows the user an audit summary before or alongside the publish result
Does not describe the profile as complete if audit evidence is still partial

evals.prompt: 我本地用了 Claude Code、Codex、Trae、Cursor，还有一些你可能不认识的 IDE 插件日志，你要尽量别漏掉任何日志。
evals.expected_output: Discovers strong-path logs plus weak-path candidates, parses what it can, attempts recovery, and records the rest explicitly in scan_audit.
assertions: Recursively scans ~/.claude/projects and merges subagent logs by sessionId
Uses Codex cumulative token snapshots instead of double-counting turn-level token events
Scans Trae state.vscdb ItemTable keys across supported key families
Scans Cursor workspaceStorage state.vscdb and composer.composerData before falling back to weaker Cursor-like chat logs
Falls back to ~/.gemini/antigravity filesystem metadata when Antigravity proxy_logs.db is absent
Uses a generic fallback parser for chat-like JSON/JSONL sources when no dedicated parser exists
If unsupported or partial sources remain, records them in the audit with a recommended action

evals.prompt: 不要只给我做数据面板，我想看到一种像年度回顾一样的 BuilderBio，让我知道我到底是哪种 builder。
evals.expected_output: Builds a builder recap that includes identity, signature build, taste signals, builder eras, and evidence-backed highlights instead of only flat charts.
assertions: Generates a builder thesis that reads like identity rather than a metric summary
Selects a signature build based on representativeness, not only raw session count
Produces taste signals or equivalent compact identity cues
Describes an evolution arc or builder eras instead of only raw weekly bars
Keeps the claims grounded in facts rather than generic praise
Does not generate meta-copy about what the page should feel like or what people should remember
Sets D.profile.lang from the user's dominant session language and keeps module titles / Make your own CTA in English

evals.prompt: 生成我的 AI 编程画像，要脱敏，不能暴露任何项目路径和仓库名。
evals.expected_output: Generates a redacted BuilderBio while preserving aggregate behavior, projects, and scan transparency.
assertions: Redacts cwd paths, repo names, and other sensitive path-like strings before publish
Preserves aggregate stats, evolution, time distribution, and highlights after redaction
Keeps scan_audit metadata so the user can still see what was scanned and whether anything was partial
Does not leak local absolute paths into the published profile

evals.prompt: 只看最近 7 天，重新更新我的 BuilderBio，并告诉我这次扫描是否完整，另外页面要看起来像是最近一周发生了什么。
evals.expected_output: Runs a 7-day scan, updates the same profile URL, explains completeness, and reframes the recap around the requested window instead of pretending to be full history.
assertions: Respects the requested 7-day cutoff
Reuses the same device identity and publish token flow for profile updates
Keeps scanner_version and scan_audit metadata on republish
Explains whether the scan is complete or partial using the audit summary
Rebuilds the narrative around the requested time window rather than stale full-history claims
